ops.body: Two premises in this task were wrong, corrected during execution (2026-07-18): (1) the installer was never triplicated — cc-orchestrate has no install-binary.sh (it is a thin MCP wrapper over the brew-installed cco); the copies were cc-review, cc-present (hand-rolled, off-lineage), and cc-skills' own slop-cop (frozen). (2) The single source is NOT cc-interact's plugin-template: cc-skills retired the repo-bootstrap template (5448bf6b) in favor of cc-guides fragments (cc-skills:install-binary-{pinned,latest}, daily cron re-render, never forked); plugin-template/render.sh only kept the retired design alive via a frozen raw-fetch of the deleted blob. Resolution therefore made cc-guides the single source and retired render.sh's fetch machinery entirely (user decision), rather than consolidating into plugin-template. Rider: slop-cop's migration (41abbdaeaec4, 952ebb40fe77) rode this task; its frozen copy turned out to already carry the d8f21c50 version-extraction fix — only the provenance stamp/mechanism was stale. The canonical installers also gained curl --connect-timeout/--max-time bounds from the review pass, propagated fleet-wide by re-render.
